title: Job Opening Category Manager at MyGlamm Global Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at MyGlamm Global Group
jsonLd.description:
MyGlamm Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MyGlamm Global Group:
MyGlamm Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MyGlamm Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
